data_source: GitHub Discussions (GraphQL API not available via MCP; data inferred from issues with 'discussion' label)
data_notes: Full Discussions GraphQL query requires gh CLI with GITHUB_TOKEN. Run scripts/analyze_discussions.py after fetching /tmp/gh_discussions.json.

sample.title: [Discussion]: Agent topic names are always generated

fetch_command: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } answer { author { login } createdAt } } } } }' > /tmp/gh_discussions.json
